title: M.Sc Jobs 2026 – Junior Research Fellow
shortInfo: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) has released a recruitment notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post for candidates with M.E./M.Tech., MCA, or M.Sc. qualifications in relevant fields, and candidates can apply through email mode until 30-05-2026 at nehu.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: NEHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) has released a recruitment notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post for candidates with M.E./M.Tech., MCA, or M.Sc. qualifications in relevant fields, and candidates can apply through email mode until 30-05-2026 at nehu.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. in BME/IT/CSE/ECE/EE/AI/ML, MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science/Electronics or Allied Areas related to Medical Image Processing and Deep Learning
qualification.details: M.E./M.Tech. in BME/IT/CSE/ECE/EE/AI/ML, MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science/Electronics or Allied Areas related to Medical Image Processing and Deep Learning.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the NEHU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NEHU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA, as per the norms of the funding agency.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E./M.Tech. in BME/IT/CSE/ECE/EE/AI/ML or an MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science/Electronics or related fields concerning Medical Image Processing and Deep Learning.

faq.question: How can I apply for the NEHU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and self-attested copies of relevant documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in this recruitment drive by North-Eastern Hill University.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the NEHU JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification for NEHU JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: What is the job type for this NEHU recruitment?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is a contractual role. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Does NEHU offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any such information.

seo_tags: North-Eastern Hill University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026
